headline: Airline Stocks Set to Hit or Beat High End of Q2 Guidance, Morgan Stanley Says

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Over the past six months, it seems like demand may be facing some headwinds as the industry’s 4.4% return has lagged the S&P 500 by 3.2 percentage points.

raw.headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Find Risky
raw.summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Over the past six months, it seems like demand may be facing some headwinds as the industry’s 4.4% return has lagged the S&P 500 by 3.2 percentage points.

headline: Why there's no 'offseason' travel anymore
summary: As summers are growing hotter and crowds are getting bigger, more Americans are choosing to visit international destinations in the early spring and fall. Airlines are betting on more people taking long-haul flights during shoulder seasons and are offering more international flights year-round. CNBC's Leslie Josephs has more.

raw.headline: Why there's no 'offseason' travel anymore

headline: Record heat, crowds drive offseason boom in international travel
summary: Airlines are extending flight schedules to maximize on lucrative international travel.

raw.headline: Record heat, crowds drive offseason boom in international travel
